scene_summary: A greenhouse-like memory archive scene with a large glowing user-profile monolith, an overhead woven extraction canopy, labeled cabinets, stained-glass concept panels, tool rails, terrariums, a fountain-like specimen tray, and a glowing prompt kiln. Many surfaces have readable labels and clear boundaries suitable for interaction mapping.
usable_surfaces: overhead Background Extraction Canopy label and woven root canopy
Preference Specimen Tray cabinet and tiered bowls
Memory Instrument Rail with four labeled tool discs
Procedural Prompt Kiln opening and tablet
Namespace Terrariums shelf with labeled glass cases

detected_objects.label: User Profile Monolith
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Large glowing glass block on the left with readable heading 'USER PROFILE', profile fields, tree/root diagrams, and labeled memory strata.

detected_objects.label: Background Extraction Canopy
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Overhead network of illuminated root-like strands with hanging notes and a central plaque reading 'BACKGROUND EXTRACTION CANOPY'.

detected_objects.label: Background Extraction Canopy Plaque
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Dark rectangular sign at the top center with the text 'BACKGROUND EXTRACTION CANOPY' and smaller action words beneath.

detected_objects.label: LangMem Seed Vault
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Black stone vault block in the lower left labeled 'LANGMEM SEED VAULT' with a circular LangMem emblem.

detected_objects.label: Hot-Path Gate
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Brass panel near the bottom center-left labeled 'HOT-PATH GATE' with icons for fact, note, reminder, correction, priority, and alert.

detected_objects.label: Core Concepts Stained Glass
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Three arched stained-glass panels labeled 'SEMANTIC MEMORY', 'EPISODIC MEMORY', and 'PROCEDURAL MEMORY' under a 'CORE CONCEPTS' header.

detected_objects.label: Preference Specimen Tray
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Right-center cabinet labeled 'PREFERENCE SPECIMEN TRAY' with stacked ceramic bowls, flowing water, and process labels like conversation and quiet period.

detected_objects.label: Memory Instrument Rail
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Row of four circular silver tool markers on stands, labeled 'SEARCH', 'WRITE', 'UPDATE', and 'CONCLUDE'.
